sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pengkul lamto un, nakpi’n gingsak un;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong pai ding hi, hong pai ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A kigo Tuuno, vanglian in hong kum,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuipite’n zong tuihual sim gingsak un;
Tuipi gei sehnel tungah kitam un,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: mei in, miza ta hilh un;
Huihpi le pingpeite’n zong zai in

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Minamte’ buaina in hong theisak hi;
Pilna khang semsem, sak khang ah mizin,
